REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1590-1592 Washington Street, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Oct-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Rudy Tondu.

After overbids, the sale was confirmed at $850,000.00 on the terms and conditions of the sale as set forth on the report of sale (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $141,000.00 is required. Mr. Schultz is to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda.
